subcodes.first_line: Iran requireth divine confirmations, and I hope that just as other countries [have received these] from the Iranians [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایران تاییدات غیبیه میخواهد امیدوارم همان نوعیکه ممالک سائره از ایرانیان
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @teachings as spirit of the age, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
